item.label: Add --root CLI flag support
item.summary: Add --root CLI flag to MCP server with precedence over AUDIAGENTIC_ROOT env var

body:
# Description

Add explicit root selection for the planning MCP launch path so tests and operators can target a chosen project root, ideally with precedence over environment-based root selection.

# Acceptance Criteria

1. A root-selection flag is accepted by the MCP launch path
2. Explicit root selection takes precedence over ambient auto-detection
3. The isolated MCP mutation suite no longer needs to xfail because of root resolution

# Notes

- Still open alongside `task-0197`; current comments in the MCP test suite say root isolation is not implemented

# State

done
